en: Flying English Hi, Jack. What time do you wake up in the morning?
ko: Flying English 안녕, Jack. 아침에 몇 시에 일어나?

en: Hi, Emma. I wake up at seven o'clock. How about you?
I wake up at half past six. Then I brush my teeth and wash my face.
ko: 나는 6시 반에 일어나. 그다음에 이를 닦고 세수해.

en: Me too. After that, I have breakfast. What do you do after breakfast?
ko: 나도. 그 후에 아침을 먹어. 아침 먹고 뭐 해?

en: I get dressed and comb my hair. What about you?
I do the same. After that, I go to school.
Do you go to the school by bus?
No. I walk to school. What do you do after school?
ko: 아니. 걸어서 학교 가. 방과 후에는 뭐 해?

en: I do my homework and watch TV.
That sounds fun. I do my homework too. And then I read a book.
ko: 재밌겠다. 나도 숙제해. 그리고 책 읽어.

en: What time do you go to bed?
I go to bed at nine o'clock. What about you?
I go to bed at half past nine.
I like talking to you, Emma. Me too, Jack. See you tomorrow.
ko: 너랑 이야기하는 거 좋아, Emma. 나도, Jack. 내일 보자.
